headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -95.3)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 139% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 124 quotes and an overwhelming 106 at strong intensity - people are extremely upset and venting hard today.
• The frustration score of 89.3 sits in the upper half of the 61-day range, showing sustained high anger levels.
• Frustrations more than doubled from yesterday while fears also dropped significantly, creating a clear emotional shift toward intense anger.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
